author: doll-agent
content: Added tests/api_proof.rs with 9 integration tests covering: scalers (Standard/MinMax/MaxAbs/Robust + Normalizer + 3 NormType variants), Power + Quantile transforms (both OutputDistribution variants), feature engineering (PolynomialFeatures, Binarizer, FunctionTransformer — all stateless Transform-only), KBinsDiscretizer (3 strategies x 2 encodings), SplineTransformer (both knot strategies), encoders (OneHot, Ordinal, Label, Binary, Target, MultiLabel binarizers), all imputers (Simple x 3 strategies, KNN x 2 weights, Iterative x 2 init strategies), full feature selection (VarianceThreshold, SelectKBest, SelectPercentile, SelectFpr/Fdr/Fwe via p-value path, SelectFromModel, SequentialFeatureSelector both directions), text (CountVectorizer + TfidfTransformer), random projection (Gaussian + Sparse). All 9 pass. Final ferrolearn-preprocess test count: 482.
